title: NO SPOILERS Rebuild of Evangelion Complete
display_title: NO SPOILERS Rebuild of Evangelion Complete
wikitext:
[]: [NO SPOILERS] Rebuild of Evangelion: Complete             Quote Post by Replicator » Mon Dec 24, 2012 7:30 pm After all of the Rebuild movies are finished, do you think KHARA/GAINAX might re-edit 1.0 and 2.0 (or possibly 3.0) even further for a "Definitive" version of Rebuild? It's like what they did with Star Wars when it came out on DVD. Maybe 1.0 and 2.0 could be tweaked so they can flow smoother with the second half of the tetralogy. Discuss.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Dec 24, 2012 11:03 pm Just Khara. Gainax has nothing to do with the new movies. I fear Anno might Lucas the hell out of the tetralogy, but I hope he doesn't. Whatever he does, in any case, will likely be to appease his own sense of perfectionism. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Tue Dec 25, 2012 12:27 am I can already see "1.0 Director's Cut, re-edited scene, Ramiel shot first".

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 25, 2012 1:07 am A.T. Fish wrote: I can already see "1.0 Director's Cut, re-edited scene, Ramiel shot first".

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Dec 25, 2012 1:09 am A.T. Fish wrote: I can already see "1.0 Director's Cut, re-edited scene, Ramiel shot first".

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Tue Dec 25, 2012 4:31 am It's a reference to Greedo in ANH.

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Tue Dec 25, 2012 7:12 am Reichu wrote: Don't need to change anything in either NGE or NME on that account.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Dec 25, 2012 9:15 am Eh. Anno doesn't seem the type to constantly readjust everything like Lucas would. He seems happy with just a few changes being made only once and being done with it. Even then, with the exception of Nadia, he'll only seem to do it with his darker works. NGE was adjusted once and left alone, Love & Pop was made longer by two minutes and left alone, and Nadia was just changed only because the Island Arc was horrible. Anno seem fine with Gunbuster, His & Hers, Cutie Honey, and Shiki-Jitsu with just the way they are, so this probably wouldn't be a knee-jerk habit of his to change stuff after the fact. That being said, 1.xx and 2.xx have already been altered. Seeing as how he's done his one series of adjustments already, I don't think he'd go back over and change stuff again. If he did, it'd be a first.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Dec 26, 2012 3:07 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: He seems happy with just a few changes being made only once and being done with it.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Wed Dec 26, 2012 6:51 am Outside of the 1.11, 2.22, 3.33 and 4.44 edited releases; I can't see them doing anything further with the movies. It's not like NTE is lacking production values like the NGE run experienced. That's what the director's cuts set out to fix mostly. That, and EOE.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Dec 26, 2012 8:58 am Blue Monday wrote: That's what the director's cuts set out to fix mostly. That, and EOE.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed Dec 26, 2012 10:06 am Mr. Tines wrote: (fixing muppet-Rei in the "you should smile" scene, for example)

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Dec 26, 2012 11:33 am Unlikely, given that they already did some polishing/adding with 1.11 and 2.22. Bringing out even more versions of it all would be downright ridiculously-cash-grabbing. And as Reichu pointed out, the SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Dec 26, 2012 4:06 pm This needs to be turned into a full fledged TV series. But beyond that, Anno should move onto non-Eva things as soon as FINAL gets a home video release.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Jan 14, 2013 9:56 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: This needs to be turned into a full fledged TV series. But beyond that, Anno should move onto non-Eva things as soon as FINAL gets a home video release.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Jan 14, 2013 10:15 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: I don't know what I'll do with my life once Evangelion is over.
